---
title: "PredictionModels"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(glmnet)
library(caret)
library(randomForest)
library(xgboost)
library(pROC)
```

```{r load-data}
master_df <- read_csv("master_data.csv")
```

```{r preprocess}
model_df <- master_df %>%
  mutate(
    injured_next_week = as.integer(injured_next_week),
    surface_type      = as.integer(factor(surface_type)),
    temp_bucket       = as.integer(factor(temp_bucket)),
    position_group    = as.integer(factor(position_group)),
    is_home           = as.integer(is_home)
  )

model_df <- model_df %>%
  select(
    injured_next_week,
    years_exp, surface_type, temp_bucket, total_plays,
    avg_air_yards, bmi, rush_plays, age, position_group,
    is_home, avg_ydline_100
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ ifelse(is.na(.), median(., na.rm = TRUE), .)))
```


```{r split}
set.seed(42)
train_idx <- createDataPartition(model_df$injured_next_week, p = 0.8, list = FALSE)
train_df  <- model_df[train_idx, ]
test_df   <- model_df[-train_idx, ]

X_train <- as.matrix(train_df %>% select(-injured_next_week))
y_train <- train_df$injured_next_week
X_test  <- as.matrix(test_df %>% select(-injured_next_week))
y_test  <- test_df$injured_next_week

injury_rate <- mean(y_train)
weights     <- ifelse(y_train == 1, (1 - injury_rate) / injury_rate, 1)
```

# Lasso Regression
```{r lasso, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
set.seed(42)
cv_lasso <- cv.glmnet(
  x = X_train, y = y_train, alpha = 1,
  nfolds = 10, family = "gaussian", weights = weights
)
final_lasso <- glmnet(
  x = X_train, y = y_train, alpha = 1,
  lambda = cv_lasso$lambda.min, family = "gaussian", weights = weights
)

# Coefficients
coef_df <- data.frame(
  feature     = rownames(coef(final_lasso)),
  coefficient = as.numeric(coef(final_lasso))
) %>%
  filter(coefficient != 0, feature != "(Intercept)") %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(coefficient)))

ggplot(coef_df, aes(x = reorder(feature, coefficient), y = coefficient, fill = coefficient > 0)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("steelblue", "tomato")) +
  labs(title = "Lasso -- Non-Zero Coefficients", x = "Feature", y = "Coefficient") +
  theme_minimal()

# Evaluate
lasso_preds_raw <- as.numeric(predict(final_lasso, newx = X_test, s = cv_lasso$lambda.min))
lasso_preds_bin <- as.integer(lasso_preds_raw >= 0.5)

cat("--- Lasso ---\n")
cat("RMSE:    ", round(sqrt(mean((lasso_preds_raw - y_test)^2)), 4), "\n")
cat("MAE:     ", round(mean(abs(lasso_preds_raw - y_test)), 4), "\n")
cat("Accuracy:", round(mean(lasso_preds_bin == y_test), 4), "\n")
print(table(Predicted = lasso_preds_bin, Actual = y_test))

roc_lasso <- roc(y_test, lasso_preds_raw, quiet = TRUE)
plot(roc_lasso, main = paste("Lasso ROC | AUC =", round(auc(roc_lasso), 3)))
```

# Random Forest
```{r random-forest, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
set.seed(42)
rf_model <- randomForest(
  x        = X_train,
  y        = factor(y_train),
  ntree    = 500,
  mtry     = floor(sqrt(ncol(X_train))),
  classwt  = c("0" = 1, "1" = (1 - injury_rate) / injury_rate),
  importance = TRUE
)

# Feature importance
importance_df <- data.frame(
  feature    = rownames(importance(rf_model)),
  importance = importance(rf_model)[, "MeanDecreaseGini"]
) %>% arrange(desc(importance))

ggplot(importance_df, aes(x = reorder(feature, importance), y = importance)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Random Forest -- Feature Importance", x = "Feature", y = "Mean Decrease Gini") +
  theme_minimal()
tuneRF(X_train, factor(y_train), stepFactor = 1.5, improve = 0.01)

# Evaluate
rf_preds_raw <- predict(rf_model, newdata = X_test, type = "prob")[, "1"]
rf_preds_bin <- as.integer(rf_preds_raw >= 0.5)

cat("--- Random Forest ---\n")
cat("RMSE:    ", round(sqrt(mean((rf_preds_raw - y_test)^2)), 4), "\n")
cat("MAE:     ", round(mean(abs(rf_preds_raw - y_test)), 4), "\n")
cat("Accuracy:", round(mean(rf_preds_bin == y_test), 4), "\n")
print(table(Predicted = rf_preds_bin, Actual = y_test))

roc_rf <- roc(y_test, rf_preds_raw, quiet = TRUE)
plot(roc_rf, main = paste("Random Forest ROC | AUC =", round(auc(roc_rf), 3)))
```

# XGBoost
```{r xgboost, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
scale_pos <- sum(y_train == 0) / sum(y_train == 1)

dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(data = X_train, label = y_train)
dtest  <- xgb.DMatrix(data = X_test,  label = y_test)

set.seed(42)
xgb_model <- xgb.train(
  params = list(
    objective        = "binary:logistic",
    eval_metric      = "auc",
    eta              = 0.05,
    max_depth        = 4,
    subsample        = 0.8,
    colsample_bytree = 0.8,
    scale_pos_weight = scale_pos
  ),
  data    = dtrain,
  nrounds = 200,
  watchlist  = list(train = dtrain, test = dtest),
  verbose    = 0
)

# Feature importance
xgb_imp <- xgb.importance(model = xgb_model)
xgb.plot.importance(xgb_imp, main = "XGBoost -- Feature Importance")

# Evaluate
xgb_preds_raw <- predict(xgb_model, dtest)
xgb_preds_bin <- as.integer(xgb_preds_raw >= 0.5)

cat("--- XGBoost ---\n")
cat("RMSE:    ", round(sqrt(mean((xgb_preds_raw - y_test)^2)), 4), "\n")
cat("MAE:     ", round(mean(abs(xgb_preds_raw - y_test)), 4), "\n")
cat("Accuracy:", round(mean(xgb_preds_bin == y_test), 4), "\n")
print(table(Predicted = xgb_preds_bin, Actual = y_test))

roc_xgb <- roc(y_test, xgb_preds_raw, quiet = TRUE)
plot(roc_xgb, main = paste("XGBoost ROC | AUC =", round(auc(roc_xgb), 3)))
```

# Model Comparison
```{r compare}
comparison <- data.frame(
  Model    = c("Lasso", "Random Forest", "XGBoost"),
  Accuracy = c(mean(lasso_preds_bin == y_test),
               mean(rf_preds_bin == y_test),
               mean(xgb_preds_bin == y_test)),
  AUC      = c(auc(roc_lasso), auc(roc_rf), auc(roc_xgb)),
  RMSE     = c(sqrt(mean((lasso_preds_raw - y_test)^2)),
               sqrt(mean((rf_preds_raw - y_test)^2)),
               sqrt(mean((xgb_preds_raw - y_test)^2)))
) %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(., 4)))

print(comparison)
```

```{r final-model}
injury_rate <- mean(y_train)
weights <- ifelse(y_train == 1, (1 - injury_rate) / injury_rate, 1)

cv_lasso <- cv.glmnet(
  x       = X_train,
  y       = y_train,
  alpha   = 1,
  nfolds  = 10,
  family  = "gaussian",
  weights = weights
)
# Non-zero coefficients
coef_df <- data.frame(
  feature     = rownames(coef(final_lasso)),
  coefficient = as.numeric(coef(final_lasso))
) %>%
  filter(coefficient != 0, feature != "(Intercept)") %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(coefficient)))

print(coef_df)
```

```{r coef-plot, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
ggplot(coef_df, aes(x = reorder(feature, coefficient), y = coefficient, fill = coefficient > 0)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("steelblue", "tomato")) +
  labs(title = "Lasso -- Non-Zero Coefficients", x = "Feature", y = "Coefficient") +
  theme_minimal()
```
```{r evaluate}
preds        <- as.numeric(predict(final_lasso, newx = X_test, s = cv_lasso$lambda.min))
preds_binary <- as.integer(pmin(pmax(preds, 0), 1) >= 0.5)

cat("RMSE:    ", round(sqrt(mean((preds - y_test)^2)), 4), "\n")
cat("MAE:     ", round(mean(abs(preds - y_test)), 4), "\n")
cat("Accuracy:", round(mean(preds_binary == y_test), 4), "\n")

table(Predicted = preds_binary, Actual = y_test)




saveRDS(xgb_model,   "xgb_model.rds")
saveRDS(rf_model,    "rf_model.rds")
saveRDS(final_lasso, "lasso_model.rds")
saveRDS(cv_lasso,    "cv_lasso.rds")  # needed for lasso lambda
```
